title: Certification Services
description: A NCEI director certification of archive authenticity.

definitions.definition: A NCEI director certification of archive authenticity.
definitions.notes: NCEI certifies hardcopy data products (generally PDF) that are generated both offline and online. Customers pay for certification from the NOAA E-Commerce system and Pay.gov. The products are typically used in litigation and insurance claims.
definitions.sources:
- NCEI/DAB
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
